segments.beat: overhead/near-overhead shot of device flat on colorful geometric surface; clear shell and PCB visible through top face
camera begins slow orbit/pull-back revealing device at 3/4 angle; see-through display lit cyan with game text prominent
continued orbit — left side and D-pad come into frame; internals and lit display visible simultaneously
low-angle push-in from front-right; transparent shell catches light, PCB copper tones visible beneath clear resin
tight creeping push toward front face; display fill-frame with cyan game text, shell edge and USB-C port briefly visible before cut

demonstrates.motion_value: high — continuous orbit lets light rake across clear shell exposing PCB throughout clip
high — cyan lit display glows against transparent pane in every frame
medium — game-style text/logo on display reads as retro gaming context but no active gameplay motion shown
medium — colorful harlequin surface and polished slow orbit give product a jewel/collectible presentation feel
low — no hand or reference object; scale inferrable only from known dimensions

selection_note: Slow cinematic orbit over colorful surface with lit see-through display running end-to-end — strongest single clip for leading with the transparency + display-on hero claim simultaneously.

aesthetics.standout: bold cyan UI text pops against neutral device body
aesthetics.weakness: loud harlequin-patchwork background dominates and cheapens the device
aesthetics.note: continuous slow orbit/zoom on a busy colored-block surface - background + flat lighting kill ad viability
